# AI Usage Log — Student A (Sadaf Sarbazi)

## Tools Used
- Claude (Anthropic) — claude.ai
- ChatGPT (OpenAI)

## How AI Was Used (Permitted)
- Debugging Python code (LDA, CountVectorizer, coherence scoring, pyLDAvis)
- Structuring Jupyter notebooks (cell organization, section headers, comments)
- Suggesting preprocessing pipeline steps (tokenization, stopword removal, lemmatization)
- Guidance on visualization syntax (coherence/perplexity plots, word clouds, bar charts)
- Explaining LDA concepts and hyperparameter effects (max_iter, learning_method, min_df)

## What Was NOT Generated by AI
- Topic interpretation or naming
- Business insights and recommendations
- Cross-group comparison analysis
- k value selection — determined independently by reviewing coherence plots
- Any conclusions about what topics mean

## Verification
All AI-generated code was reviewed, tested, and modified as needed to ensure 
correctness and alignment with assignment requirements.
